Uses of Package
com.intergral.fusionreactor.api

  • Packages that use com.intergral.fusionreactor.api 
    Package Description
    com.intergral.fusionreactor.api  
  • Classes in com.intergral.fusionreactor.api used by com.intergral.fusionreactor.api 
    Class Description
    FRAPI
    This class defines the public interface to FusionReactor.
    IFusionRequestSurrogate
    This interface specifies the available proxied information from an internal FusionRequest.
    ILicenseState
    Provides information about the license state.
    IProbiCallback  
    IProbiCallback.ICallbackRegistration  
    IProbiCallback.IMetricStore  
    ISignalState
    Reports whether each observability signal is currently active (licensed and not disabled via config).
    ITransactionSurrogate
    This type encapsulates a transaction, providing access to the transaction info, regardless of transaction flavor/type.
    IVersion
    The FusionReactor version interface.
